name: l7_hole_emergency_gate_85
description: Switch to survive mode as soon as hole count crosses 85 so collapse-prone boards stop prioritizing greedy line setups.
llm_notes: Failure episodes average 99.66 holes vs 75.22 in successes (delta 24.44) while max height differs by only 0.41, so hole-triggered gating should separate terminal trajectories earlier than height-only control.

name: l7_opening_hole_penalty_0_24_v2
description: Increase hole penalty through the first 24 pieces to stabilize the opening-to-midgame transition on wide-board runs.
llm_notes: Failures end after 23.23 pieces on average with 99.66 holes, and outlier success openings have lower early holes (78.8) than baseline early holes (85.7), supporting a stronger early discipline window.

name: l7_surface_volatility_brake_height_critical
description: Keep bumpiness suppression, but only intensify it once stack height is in the critical band so safe boards are not over-constrained.
llm_notes: Bumpiness is the strongest separator (7.92 failure vs 1.44 success, delta 6.48) and level-7 avg height is already 19.63, so a high-height activation should focus anti-volatility pressure where deaths cluster.
